name: firefox-lldb
description: LLDB platform server and GDB remote stub for debugging WebAssembly running inside Firefox

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run format:check
scripts.component:transpile: npx jco transpile vendor/gdbstub-component/target/wasm32-wasip2/release/firefox_lldb_gdbstub_component.wasm -o src/gdb/generated --name gdbstub --instantiation async && node scripts/patch-generated.mjs
scripts.component: npm run component:build && npm run component:transpile
scripts.sourcemap:transpile: npx jco transpile vendor/source-map-dwarf-component/target/wasm32-wasip2/release/firefox_lldb_source_map_component.wasm -o src/sourcemap/generated --name sourcemap --instantiation async
scripts.sourcemap: npm run sourcemap:build && npm run sourcemap:transpile
scripts.build:fixtures: npm run build:fixture-simple && npm run build:fixture-oop && npm run build:fixture-parser && npm run build:fixture-ledger && npm run build:fixture-types && npm run build:fixture-heap && npm run build:fixture-trap && npm run build:fixture-sourcemap
scripts.build:fixture-sourcemap: cd test/e2e/fixtures/sourcemap && ${EMSDK:+$EMSDK/upstream/emscripten/}emcc math.cpp -o math.js -gsource-map -O0 -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS='["cwrap"]' -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_NAME=MathModule
scripts.build:fixture-simple: cd test/e2e/fixtures/simple && ${EMSDK:+$EMSDK/upstream/emscripten/}emcc math.cpp -o math.js -g -O0 -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS='["cwrap"]' -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_NAME=MathModule
scripts.build:fixture-oop: cd test/e2e/fixtures/oop && ${EMSDK:+$EMSDK/upstream/emscripten/}emcc oop.cpp -o oop.js -g -O0 -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS='["cwrap"]' -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_NAME=OopModule
scripts.build:fixture-parser: cd test/e2e/fixtures/parser && ${EMSDK:+$EMSDK/upstream/emscripten/}emcc parser.cpp -o parser.js -g -O0 -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS='["cwrap"]' -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_NAME=ParserModule
scripts.build:fixture-ledger: cd test/e2e/fixtures/ledger && ${EMSDK:+$EMSDK/upstream/emscripten/}emcc ledger.cpp -o ledger.js -g -O0 -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS='["cwrap"]' -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_NAME=LedgerModule
scripts.build:fixture-types: cd test/e2e/fixtures/types && ${EMSDK:+$EMSDK/upstream/emscripten/}emcc types.cpp -o types.js -g -O0 -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS='["cwrap"]' -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_NAME=TypesModule
scripts.build:fixture-heap: cd test/e2e/fixtures/heap && ${EMSDK:+$EMSDK/upstream/emscripten/}emcc heap.cpp -o heap.js -g -O0 -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS='["cwrap"]' -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_NAME=HeapModule
scripts.build:fixture-trap: cd test/e2e/fixtures/trap && ${EMSDK:+$EMSDK/upstream/emscripten/}emcc trap.cpp -o trap.js -g -O0 -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS='["cwrap"]' -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_NAME=TrapModule
